历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 17760 → 22633 → 25922 → 34696 → 29144, with a continuous backward shift from 2021 to 2024, and a significant forward shift of about 5552 places in 2025, indicating a clear recovery signal; the 2025 baseline is approximately 29144; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 65 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 113 in 2025; in 2026, Physics Category has 95 places and Medical Category has 20 places (both requiring Physics and Chemistry), totaling 115, an increase of 2 places (+1.8%) compared to 2025, a very small expansion with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 92nd, with recent rankings stable between 86–92, slightly dropping to 92nd in 2026, with a clear level positioning; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, with teacher ethics incidents potentially having a mild inhibitory effect on overall application psychology; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 100th), with no obvious popularity boost or negative spread; Foreign Language and Literature A- is the only A- or above discipline, weakly related to Physics Category enrollment; Physics Category mainly relies on basic disciplines such as Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Computer Science, which are not individually rated in discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province, estimated at about 69.4% of the total, is approximately 313,000, slightly decreasing from 320,800 in 2025; Hunan Normal University is located in Hunan Province, not a local university; Anhui Physics Category candidates applying to engineering/teacher-training majors at out-of-province 211 normal universities need to consider regional preferences and major matching comprehensively.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant recovery in 2025 rankings, a minimal expansion of 2 places in 2026, sustained high popularity of hot engineering majors attracting Physics Category candidates, a slightly negative reputation with mild inhibition, and a slight decrease in local Physics Category candidates, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 29144; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 29503, with a range of 29003–30003.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2423 → 2679 → 3240 → 4250 → 4107, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1684 places in the past 4 years; in 2025, there was a slight forward shift of about 143 places compared to 2024, indicating a stabilization and recovery signal, with a 2025 baseline of about 4107; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 40 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 56 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 52, a reduction of 4 places (-7.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and exerts a forward push on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, approximately 92nd in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 86 and 92, a slight decline in 2026, overall level stable; reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to a public shaming incident involving a College of Literature professor humiliating a student seeking help, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 100th), short video exposure is relatively low, with no obvious popularity boost; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Languages and Literature is rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to majors such as Foreign Languages and Literature and Chinese Language and Literature in the History Category, with limited disciplinary strength but distinctive normal university characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, while journalism and communication majors are clearly discouraged; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 451,000, with History Category estimated at about 138,000 based on the recent proportion of about 30.6%, a slight decrease from 141,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Hunan Normal University is located in Hunan Province, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference; Anhui examinees applying for out-of-province 211 normal universities need to weigh regional preferences, with cross-province application popularity being average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the overall backward trend in historical rankings but a stabilization signal in 2025, a reduction of 4 places in 2026 slightly intensifying competition, a somewhat negative reputation possibly suppressing application enthusiasm, and a slight decrease in the number of provincial History Category examinees, the ranking is expected to shift slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 4107; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3901, with a range of 3401–4401.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学医学类在安徽省2021至2025年最低录取位次分别为17760、19414、24415、25259、34787，呈现持续下降趋势（位次数字逐年增大），表明医学类在安徽的录取难度 逐年降低。总计划人数从2021年8人增至2024年24人，2025年微调至23人。2026年招生计划进一步缩减至20人（缩招3人，幅度约13%），其中临床医学维持12人，药学4人，预防医 学2人，医学检验技术2人，康复治疗学未列入2026年计划。缩招将一定程度上抑制位次继续大幅下滑。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于湖南省长沙市，是一所以师范为特色的综合性大学。其医学部（原医学院）办学历史悠久，在省内及周边 省份具有一定影响力。作为211院校，对安徽考生仍具备较强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续较高，临床医学作为核心专业竞争最为激烈。但湖南师范大学医学类在安徽省的招生规模相对较小（20人），且地处湖南长沙，对 安徽考生而言属于省外院校，地域吸引力略低于省内同层次高校。2024至2025年位次大幅下滑（从25259降至34787），反映出安徽考生对该校医学类的报考意愿有所降温。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年趋势修正，预测2026年湖南师范大学医学类在安徽省最低录取位次约为31765名，较2025年（34787名）有所回升（位次数字减小），主要受2026 年缩招3人及近年位次持续走低后的回调预期影响。预计录取位次区间为31365至32165名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Anhui Province from 2021 to 2025 were 17760, 19414, 24415, 25259, and 34787 respectively, showing a continuous downward trend (ranking numbers increasing year by year), indicating that the admission difficulty for the medical category in Anhui has been decreasing year by year. The total planned enrollment increased from 8 in 2021 to 24 in 2024, with a slight adjustment to 23 in 2025. In 2026, the enrollment plan is further reduced to 20 (a reduction of 3, approximately 13%), among which Clinical Medicine maintains 12, Pharmacy 4, Preventive Medicine 2, Medical Laboratory Technology 2, and Rehabilitation Therapy is not included in the 2026 plan. The enrollment reduction will to some extent curb the continued significant decline in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national key construction university under Project 211 and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university. Located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, it is a comprehensive university with a focus on teacher education. Its medical department (formerly the Medical College) has a long history and holds a certain influence within the province and neighboring regions. As a 211 university, it still has strong appeal to Anhui candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have maintained high popularity nationwide in recent years, with Clinical Medicine as the core major facing the most intense competition. However, the enrollment scale of Hunan Normal University's medical category in Anhui Province is relatively small (20 people), and it is located in Changsha, Hunan, making it an out-of-province institution for Anhui candidates, with slightly lower regional appeal compared to similar-level universities within the province. The significant drop in rankings from 2024 to 2025 (from 25259 to 34787) reflects a cooling willingness of Anhui candidates to apply for this university's medical category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical trend correction, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Anhui Province in 2026 will be approximately 31765, an increase (ranking number decreasing) compared to 2025 (34787), mainly influenced by the reduction of 3 enrollments in 2026 and the expected rebound after the continuous decline in rankings in recent years. The predicted admission ranking range is 31365 to 32165.

Clinical Medicine is the most competitive, while Preventive Medicine has the relatively lowest threshold.
